.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(55, 55, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(54, 173, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(38, 158, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(34, 30, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(136, 72, 177) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(188, 69, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(199, 108, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(51, 51, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(148, 0, 161) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(51, 51, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(51, 51, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
